See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 5993180 => 'St. Eustatius', 5993182 => 'St. Eustatius', 5993183 => 'St. Eustatius', 5994160 => 'Saba', 5994162 => 'Saba', 5994163 => 'Saba', 599417 => 'Saba', 59971 => 'Bonaire', 59972 => 'Bonaire', 59975 => 'Bonaire', ];
